name: patternfetch
description: Tiny zero-dependency client for patternfetch — agent-first API + MCP for US stocks, ETFs and crypto spot. Ticker + timeframe in, token-compact market-state brief out: compact candles, patterns with backtested base rate and lift vs baseline, support/resistance, regime, indicators. Impersonal data, not investment advice. Ships a local stdio MCP bridge.
author: patternfetch
